{{Quote|Captain on the bridge.|Imperial Cruiser Captain|<ref name="Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''</ref>}}
The Imperial '''Cruiser''' was an aquatic-based [[Navy/Legends|naval]] vessel that was developed for use in shore bombardment and the shelling of enemy fleets. It boasted a single large [[Cannon/Legends|cannon]]. Upgraded heavy versions included two large cannons and heavier, more reinforced [[Armor/Legends|armor]].

{{Veh-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Cruisers appear in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] expansion pack [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
